nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Project guidance for the morsebrowser React migration covering hard requirements, migration status, agent roles, KO-to-React mapping, and audio rules.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level project overview documenting the monorepo structure, the web and mobile apps, the shared core engine, and development commands.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root workspace manifest defining the npm/turbo monorepo workspaces and shared dev scripts for the morsebrowser packages and apps.

nodes.name: setup.sh
nodes.summary: Large bootstrap shell script that scaffolds the monorepo, writing out package configs and source files (including TypeScript via heredocs) to set up the project from scratch.
nodes.languageNotes: Linear shell script emitting many project files via heredocs; embedded TypeScript like deepMerge lives inside those heredocs rather than as shell functions.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript compiler configuration providing shared compiler options inherited across the monorepo packages and apps.

nodes.name: turbo.json
nodes.summary: Turborepo pipeline configuration defining task dependencies and caching for dev, build, and test across the workspace.
